network.airgapped: I-AIRGAPPED TRIAGE NETWORK — AYIKHO I-INTERNET EDINGEKAYO

network.capacity_critical: OKUBALULEKILE: CABANGA UKUDALA INODE ENTSHA YEMESHI
network.no_clients_leader: Awekho amaklayenti axhunyiwe. Yabelana ngekhodi ye-QR kumavolontiya agibele.
network.no_roster: Awekho amalungu ohlelo okwamanje. Engeza amalungu eqembu ukuze ulandelele ukuthi ubani okhona.
network.no_tasks: Ayikho imisebenzi okwamanje. Dala imisebenzi ukuze uhlele iqembu lakho.
network.no_devices: Awekho amadivayisi atholakele. Cindezela okuthi "Skena Amadivayisi" ukuze uthole imishini yezokwelapha eseduze ye-BLE.
network.scan_join: Skena ukuze uvule uhlelo lokusebenza futhi ujoyine
intake.drop_files: Dedela amafayela lapha noma chofoza ukuze uphequlule
tasks.emergency_desc: Lokhu kuzoshaya i-alamu kuwo WONKE amadivayisi axhunyiwe.
ward.discharge_placeholder: Isifinyezo sokukhishwa, imiyalelo yokulandelela, ukuhlolwa kokugcina...
ward.no_rx_plan: Ayikho i- RX Plan eyabekwa lesi siguli.
plan.recovery_triad: Ingozi ye- triad ebulalayo (i- hypothermia + i- coagulopathy + i- acidosis) - ukuvimbela ngokhahlo.
plan.recovery_los_long: I-LOS yesibhedlela esilindelekile: izinsuku ezingu-7 kuya kwezingu-21 kuye ngohambo lokuhlinzwa.
plan.recovery_hemo_ii: Ukulahleka kwegazi okuphawulekayo, ukuqapha okuqhubekayo esikhungweni, ukulahleka kwegazi okulindelekile: izinsuku ezingu-3-7.
plan.recovery_stable: Ukuqina kwegazi ngesikhathi sokuhlolwa, ukunakekelwa kwezilonda, ama-antibiotic, ukuphathwa kobuhlungu, ukuhlolwa nsuku zonke.
plan.recovery_tbi: I-TBI: {gcsCat} - ukuhlolwa kwe-neuro q1-2h. I-CT ikhanda lapho ifika. Gwema ukulimala kwesibili (gcina i-SBP > 90, i-SpO2 > 94%).
plan.recovery_chest: Ukulimala esifubeni - i-CXR ekufikeni, ukuqapha ukuthuthukiswa kwe-hemothorax.
plan.recovery_obstetric: I-obstetric: ukuqapha isisu lapho sifika. Ukuzinza komama = ukuzinza kwesisu.
export.label: Ilebula
shift.title: UMBONISELO WOKUSHINTSHA
shift.name: Igama
export.confidential: Imininingwane Yezokwelapha  ⁇  Uhlelo Lwe-Triage Olugcinwe Ngomoya  ⁇  I-CONFIDENTIAL
plan.txa_window: I-TXA WINDOW  ⁇  Kumelwe inikeze ngaphambi kokuphela kwePARAM
plan.pediatric_alert: I-PEDIATRIC PATIENT  ⁇  Zonke izilinganiso zisekelwe esilinganisweni (PARAMweight kg)
plan.pregnant_alert: UKUTHALA  ⁇  I- Doxycycline ayivumelekile, ukubeka ngakwesobunxele, ukuqapha isisu
region.head: Ikhanda
bp.m_tourniquet: Sebenzisa i-turniquet - iphezulu futhi iqine, 2-3 eduze kwesilonda. Bhala isikhathi ku-turniquet.
bp.m_pack_wound: Isilonda sokupakisha: i-hemostatic gauze (i-Combat Gauze), ingcindezi eqondile okungenani imizuzu engu-3.
bp.m_txa_push: TXA {dose} IV / IO ngaphezu kwemizuzu engu-10 - DEADLINE {deadline}. Landela ngomthamo ofanayo ngaphezu kwamahora angu-8.
bp.m_controlled: Ukugeleza kwegazi kulawulwa - ukuqapha ukugqoka, ukuhlola kabusha i-Q5 min.
bp.m_txa_controlled: TXA 1g IV/IO ngaphezu kwemizuzu engu-10 (ukulimala {time}, isikhathi {deadline}).
bp.m_no_hemorrhage: Ayikho ukugeleza kwegazi okusebenzayo. ukuqapha ukugeleza kwegazi kwangaphakathi okungabonakali (umshini + ukuthambekela kwe-VS).
bp.a_obstructed: I-OBSTRUCTED - i- jaw thrust / chin lift ngokushesha. i-NPA uma kungasolwa ukuthi i-basilar skull fracture.
bp.a_cric: Uma i-NPA yehluleka: ukuhlinzwa kwendlela yokuphefumula (i-cricothyrotomy).
bp.a_npa: Ukufakwa kwe-NPA: gcoba, faka umhlathi ongakwesokudla.
bp.a_patent: Gcina isikhundla, uphinde uhlole uma kushintsha i-LOC.
bp.a_gcs_low: I-GCS <= 8 - ingozi enkulu yokudonsa umoya. Vikela izindlela zokuphefumula. Cabangela izindlela zokuphefumula eziphambili uma izinsiza zivumela.
bp.r_absent: Ayikho imisindo yokuphefumula - qinisekisa indlela yokuphefumula, qala ukuphefumula kwe-BVM.
bp.r_tension: Umfutho we-pneumonia osolwayo - ukucindezelwa kwe-needle MANJE: umugqa wesibili we-ICS midclavicular, inaliti engu-14g.
bp.r_tension_repeat: Uma kungekho ngcono: hlola ohlangothini oluphambene.
bp.r_open_chest: Isilonda esifubeni esivulekile - i-vented chest seal iyathandwa.
bp.r_open_chest_monitor: Ukuqapha ukucindezeleka ngemva kokufaka uphawu - kungase kudingeke ukufaka uphawu noma ukuguqula kube umoya.
bp.r_diminished: Ukuncipha kokuphefumula kuzwakala ohlangothini olulodwa - ukuhlolwa kabusha kokuthuthukiswa kwe-hemothorax/pneumothorax.
bp.r_effective: Ukuphefumula okuphumelelayo. I-SPO2 {spo2}%. I-O2 eyengeziwe uma ikhona ne-SPO2 < 94%.
bp.c_severe: IV-hole enkulu x2 noma i-IO. LR 1L -- titrate ku-SBP 80-90 mmHg (i-permissive hypotension).
bp.c_moderate: Ukufinyelela kwe-IV (18g min). LR 500mL bolus, ukuhlolwa kabusha.
bp.c_stable: I- int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int int
bp.h_active: I-hypothermia esebenzayo - susa izingubo ezimanzi ngaso leso sikhathi. I-insulate. I-IV efudumele. Ukushisa kufaka i-axillae / groin (hhayi ngqo esikhumbeni).
bp.h_gentle: Phatha ngobumnene - ukwehla kwamazinga okushisa okulinganiselayo noma okunzima kuletha ingozi ye-VFib ngenxa yokuxokozela.
bp.h_prevent: Ukuvimbela ukushisa okuphansi: susa izingubo ezimanzi, ingubo yendawo, uvimbe umhlabathi.
bp.u_amoxicillin: I-Amoxicillin {dose} PO q8h x7 izinsuku - ukuvimbela izilonda.
bp.u_amox_pregnant: I-Amoxicillin 500mg PO q8h x7 izinsuku - i-penicillin allergy, kodwa iyadingeka ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa (i-doxycycline iyaphikiswa).
bp.u_doxycycline: I-doxycycline 100mg PO q12h x7 izinsuku - ukufakwa esikhundleni kwe-penicillin.
bp.u_ketamine: Ketamine {kIV}mg IV push kancane (0.2mg/kg) OR {kIM}mg IM. Phinda uhlole q30min. Thatha i- midazolam 1-2mg IV ukuze ivele.
bp.u_ondansetron: I- Ondansetron {dose} IV/ OTT PRN i- nausea (ikakhulukazi nge- ketamine).
bp.u_spinal: Umgogodla osolwayo - gcina ukuzinza okuhambisanayo. Ukuqopha ngeqembu labantu abathathu +. Nciphisa konke ukunyakaza.
bp.u_lateral: I-decubitus eseceleni kwesobunxele noma i-kidge eseceleni kwesobunxele - inciphisa ukucindezelwa kwe-aortocaval.
bp.u_oxytocin: I-Oxytocin 10U IM AFTER placental delivery. Landela nge-10-40U ku-1L IV ye-PPH.
bp.drug_txa_regimen: {dose} IV phezu 10 amaminithi, bese umthamo ofanayo phezu 8hr
bp.drug_ketamine_regimen: I-PRN yokusheshisa i- IV. I- max 3 doses ngaphambi kokuhlolwa kabusha.
bp.drug_ketamine_warning: Ukuvela kwemiphumela emibi kungenzeka. uma isetshenziswa isikhathi eside, sebenzisa i- midazolam 1mg IV kusengaphambili.
bp.mon_vitals: Izakhi ezibalulekile (HR, SBP, RR, SpO2) njalo {freq} iminithi.
bp.mon_gcs: GCS: Hlola kabusha njalo ngemva kwemizuzu engu-15.
bp.mon_dressings: Izingubo zokugqoka: phinda uhlole q5 min kuze kube yilapho i-hemostasis iqinisekisiwe.
bp.mon_internal: Qaphela izimpawu zokopha kwangaphakathi (HR trend, SBP trend).
bp.mon_urine: Ukukhipha umchamo: inhloso > 0.5 mL/kg/hr (ukufakwa kahle kwe-perfusion).
bp.mon_temp: Izinga lokushisa: phinda uhlole q30 min, ugweme ukulahlekelwa ukushisa.
bp.mon_txa: Ukufakwa kwe- TXA yesondlo: isikhwama esiphelele samahora angu-8 kuze kufike isikhathi.
bp.mon_decomp: Ngemva kokucindezela: phinda uhlole umsindo wokuphefumula q15min.
bp.rx_txa: ({n}) TXA {dose} IV phezu 10 amaminithi - ke umthamo ofanayo phezu 8hr
bp.rx_ketamine: ({n}) Ukuhlushwa kwe- ketamine {dose} IV PRN (q30min max, ukuhlolwa kabusha ngemuva kwemithamo emithathu)
bp.rx_oxytocin: ({n}) I-Oxytocin 10U IM ngemuva kokubeletha kwe-placental - ke i-40U/1L IV infusion PRN
bp.rec_triad: Ingozi ye- triad ebulalayo (i- hypothermia + i- coagulopathy + i- acidosis) - ukuvimbela ngokhahlo.
bp.rec_los_long: I-LOS yesibhedlela esilindelekile: izinsuku ezingu-7 kuya kwezingu-21 kuye ngohambo lokuhlinzwa.
bp.rec_significant: Ukulahleka kwegazi okuphawulekayo, ukuqapha okuqhubekayo esikhungweni, ukulahleka kwegazi okulindelekile: izinsuku ezingu-3-7.
bp.rec_stable: Ukuqina kwegazi ngesikhathi sokuhlolwa, ukunakekelwa kwezilonda, ama-antibiotic, ukuphathwa kobuhlungu, ukuhlolwa nsuku zonke.
bp.rec_tbi: I-TBI: {gcsCat} - ukuhlolwa kwe-neuro q1-2h. I-CT ikhanda lapho ifika. Gwema ukulimala kwesibili (gcina i-SBP > 90, i-SpO2 > 94%).
bp.rec_chest: Ukulimala esifubeni - i-CXR ekufikeni, ukuqapha ukuthuthukiswa kwe-hemothorax.
bp.rec_obstetric: I-obstetric: ukuqapha isisu lapho sifika. Ukuzinza komama = ukuzinza kwesisu.
bp.esc_sbp: I-SBP yehla ngaphansi kuka-80 mmHg naphezu kokopha noketshezi okulawulwayo.
bp.esc_gcs: I-GCS yehla ngamaphuzu amabili kusukela ekuhlolweni kokuqala.
bp.esc_spo2: I-SpO2 yehle ngaphansi kuka-90% ku-O2 eyengeziwe.
bp.esc_tq: Isayithi le- Tourniquet libonisa ukuchitheka kwegazi okuvuselelekile noma okuwohlokayo.
bp.esc_decomp: Ngemva kokucindezela: ukucindezeleka kokuphefumula okuphindaphindiwe - phinda inaliti noma ishubhu lesifuba.
bp.esc_txa: I-TXA engaphathwanga ngaphambi kwe- {deadline} - idokhumenti, INGANikezi ngemuva kwewindi.
ward.no_wards_desc: Dala iwadi yakho yokuqala ukuze uqale ukuphatha iziguli.
comms.scan_qr: Cela ilungu elisha liskene le khodi ye-QR ukuze lixhume
tasks.announce_desc: Lokhu kuzofundwa ngokuzwakalayo kuwo wonke amadivayisi axhunyiwe.
settings.device_permissions_desc: Phatha ukufinyelela kwe-audio, imakrofoni nekhamera yale divayisi
settings.family_lookup_desc: Yakha ikhodi ye-QR yemindeni ukuze ifune iziguli kumadivayisi ayo
lookup.title: Ukuhlolwa Kwesiguli
lookup.subtitle: Funa ilungu lomkhaya ngegama
lookup.no_results: Azikho iziguli ezatholakala zihambisana nalelo gama.
lookup.instructions: Faka igama lesiguli ngenhla ukuze useshe
lookup.privacy_note: Kuboniswa kuphela iziguli eziye zavuma ukuhlolwa komkhaya.
ward.discharge_qr_desc: Cela isiguli sihlaziye le khodi ye-QR kudivayisi yaso ukuze sithole amarekhodi aso ezokwelapha.
triage.empty_response: Imodeli ye-AI ayiphendulanga. Lokhu kungenzeka lapho imodeli isalokhu ilayisha noma isicelo sinzima kakhulu. Sicela uzame futhi.
discharge.title: Isifinyezo Sokukhishwa Kwezimali
discharge.scan_instructions: Hlola ikhodi ye-QR engezansi ukuze uthole amarekhodi akho omtholampilo
inv.no_activity: Ayikho imisebenzi eqoshiwe okwamanje  ⁇  sebenzisa noma ugcwalise izinto ukuze ubone umlando
translator.title: Umhumushi
translator.speaker: Isikhulumi
network.qr_join_hint: Amalungu eqembu ahlanganyela ngokuhlola ikhodi ye-QR kusuka kudivayisi yomholi
translator.empty_hint: Thinta imakrofoni, khuluma, futhi ukuhumusha kuzovela. Sebenzisa umcibisholo ukushintsha izikhulumi phakathi {kwesobunxele} futhi {kwesokudla}
app.disclaimer: Imigomo Yokusebenzisa & Isinqumo Sezomthetho: Isistimu ye-HALT iyithuluzi lokuxhumanisa ulwazi elakhelwe imvelo enzima. AKUYONA idivayisi yezokwelapha eqinisekisiwe (SaMD) futhi ayivunyelwe yi-FDA. Ngokusebenzisa le software, uyavuma ukuthi yonke imihlahlandlela eyenziwe yi-AI nokuhlukaniswa okuhlosiwe kufanele kuqinisekiswe yisazi sezokwelapha esiqeqeshiwe ngaphambi kokufaka isicelo somtholampilo. Inikezwe "njengoba kunjalo", ngaphandle kwewaranti yanoma yiluphi uhlobo.
